title: Finally seeing some consistency with low drawdown.
author: morriase
selftext:
Trading is usually a rollercoaster for me, but I’ve been leaning on an algorithm (ARCHON) to take the emotion out of it. I’m pretty happy with the stability lately—sitting at about 12% gain with less than 3% drawdown.

I’ve attached the equity growth curve and a quick clip of the live positions. (Not a sales pitch)

Would love to chat with anyone else automating or willing to do so. What filters are you guys using to avoid the stop-loss hunting we've seen lately?

https://preview.redd.it/glu5647xi0ng1.png?width=1247&format=png&auto=webp&s=68f6603b5cb01aea76489dd012fff035439116bb

A quick trades snapshot- Definitely NOT a representation of future outcomes!

https://reddit.com/link/1rkjed0/video/yx8ovy69k0ng1/player
